title: Senior Financial Analyst - S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited:
S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited!
